channel.title: j436zhu on QUANTUM INFORMATION WITH TRAPPED IONS
channel.description: Recent content in j436zhu on QUANTUM INFORMATION WITH TRAPPED IONS

item.title: Jingwen (Monica) Zhu
item.description: Jingwen (Monica) received her undergrad education from University of Toronto. She will join the QSim team as a new Phy MSc student at UWaterloo.
